title: International Paper Company (IP) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: International Paper Company (IP) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript.

title: International Paper (IP) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Down Y/Y
text: International Paper's (IP) Q1 earnings decline year on year, reflecting the ongoing customer inventory destocking.

title: International Paper (IP) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: International Paper (IP) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.53 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.49 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.76 per share a year ago.

title: International Paper (IP) to Post Q1 Earnings: What Awaits?
text: International Paper's (IP) Q1 performance will likely reflect the ongoing weakness in packaging demand due to muted customer spending and elevated costs.

title: International Paper: Challenges Ahead
text: We are looking at a good year despite ongoing challenges. There is still some modest destocking and new capacity is coming online.
